opportunities.title: Senior AI Governance Program Manager
opportunities.description: Remote senior manager role overseeing governance, risk, and compliance programs for AI products. Involves policy development, cross-functional coordination, and external engagement on responsible AI. Full-service role with direct leadership exposure.

opportunities.title: Principal Technical Program Manager
opportunities.description: Principal TPM role leading strategic programs with a meaningful AI transformation portfolio. Requires 7+ years in technical program management, 3+ at principal/staff level. Company makes version control and DevOps tools.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Engineering
opportunities.description: TPM role at one of Europe's leading AI labs, supporting engineering programs and cross-functional execution. Strong intersection with AI product development and responsible deployment.

opportunities.title: AI Ethics and Public Policy Researcher
opportunities.description: Research role leading targeted efforts on AI ethics and policy topics to support internal decision making and external engagement. DeepMind is one of the world's premier AI research organizations (London-based, Google DeepMind).

opportunities.title: AI Inclusive San Francisco — Monthly Meetup
opportunities.description: Active Meetup group welcoming women and non-binary folks interested in AI. Free events focused on discussing AI topics, skill-building, and socializing. Check Meetup for next scheduled event.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers SF — Biweekly Meetup
opportunities.description: SF chapter of the global AI Tinkerers network — practitioners building with AI meet to share demos, discuss models, and connect. Strong signal-to-noise ratio relative to typical tech meetups.

opportunities.title: SF Bay Area AI Meetup
opportunities.description: Large active Meetup group for AI practitioners in the Bay Area — talks, demos, and networking. Mix of technical and applied/policy topics. Good for broad network maintenance.

opportunities.title: UN Global Dialogue on AI Governance — First Session
opportunities.description: First session of the UN-hosted global dialogue on AI governance, July 6–7 in Geneva. While not a traditional CFP, civil society and expert input is actively sought in advance. Relevant for positioning in international AI governance spaces.
